During the R14 enemy phase, Ghoul from the Depths moved from Bathroom to Guest Hall even though its card has no Hunter keyword, and the successfully evaded/exhausted Ghoul Priest moved from Hallway to Parlor despite exhausted enemies being unable to perform Hunter movement. Their movement contributed 3 Parlor doom at upkeep and directly triggered agenda defeat at R15. This is a recurrence of the reported enemy-movement bug.
